title: March for Housing Justice
description: Demand affordable housing and an end to predatory evictions. Bring signs and water.

title: Climate Strike: Fossil Fuel Divestment
description: Pressure city pension funds to divest from fossil fuels. Student and worker solidarity.

title: Healthcare is a Right Rally
description: Rally for universal healthcare coverage. Speakers from nurses union and patient advocates.

title: Workers United: Fight for Fair Wages
description: Join unions and worker advocates demanding a living wage and overtime protections. Bring your union gear and be ready to march to City Hall.

title: Protect the Vote: Voting Rights March
description: March against voter suppression laws and demand expanded ballot access for all eligible citizens. Wear comfortable shoes for a 1.5-mile route to the State Capitol.
